overall.description: A slow first-person walk along a high-rise balcony in a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera overlooks a massive circular plaza structure with a holographic billboard, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers and industrial smokestacks. The scene features prominent neon lighting and a hazy, overcast atmosphere characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise balcony overlooking central city plaza

agents.ego_description: walking slowly along a curved high-rise balcony overlooking a futuristic city plaza with a prominent circular monument

entered.detail: large circular multi-tiered building with red neon trim at the base, located in the city center below
massive floating digital screen displaying advertisements above the plaza structure
tall futuristic towers with illuminated windows forming the city skyline
tall factory chimneys emitting dark smoke into the overcast sky
glass and metal safety barrier along the edge of the high-rise walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from a high-rise balcony overlooking a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza. A massive circular structure dominates the center of the view, topped with a glowing holographic billboard. The surrounding skyline features towering glass skyscrapers and distant industrial smokestacks emitting smoke. The camera moves slowly forward along the concrete balcony, with a glass railing visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved high-rise balcony with structural columns

events.description: camera passes a vertical metal support column while continuing along the curved balcony path
red neon lights become visible on the right side, casting red glow on the balcony railing

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved balcony walkway, passing structural columns and approaching red neon lighting fixtures

entered.detail: thick vertical structural pillar supporting the balcony roof, passing by on the left
square metal floor grate for air circulation embedded in the balcony floor
tall vertical light fixture emitting bright red neon light along the balcony edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving along the curved balcony, passing vertical support columns. The circular plaza structure shifts toward the left side of the frame as the perspective changes. Red neon light poles appear on the right side, beginning to cast a red glow on the railing and floor. The industrial smokestacks remain visible in the background against the dusky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved balcony with prominent red neon lighting

events.description: red neon lights dominate the right side of the frame, significantly changing the local lighting color

agents.ego_description: walking past bright red neon light fixtures that illuminate the curved balcony railing, with the plaza now visible to the left rear

entered.detail: sharply curved segment of the balcony with red-lit railing wrapping around the building corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera moving past prominent red neon light fixtures that bathe the curved balcony in red light. The circular plaza structure is now visible in the distance to the left, while the camera follows the curving railing around the building corner. The industrial skyline remains visible ahead, with the glass skyscrapers and smokestacks silhouetted against the darkening dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a high-rise balcony that shifts from a wide overlook of a futuristic plaza into a narrow, neon-drenched corridor. It begins by gliding forward past a glass railing, overlooking a massive circular structure topped with a glowing holographic billboard and a skyline of glass skyscrapers and smoking industrial stacks. As the camera continues along the curved concrete path, the plaza structure drifts toward the left of the frame while red neon light poles emerge on the right, beginning to cast a crimson glow across the floor. The scene then intensifies in color as the camera passes directly beneath prominent red fixtures that bathe the entire balcony in deep light. Finally, the perspective follows the curving railing around a building corner, leaving the plaza in the distance while the industrial skyline remains silhouetted against the darkening dusk sky.
